name: AI Avatar by VideoAny
tagline: Create talking AI avatar videos from one portrait and a voice track.
description: Generate AI avatar videos via VideoAny at https://videoany.io/tools/ai-avatar. Upload an avatar image (JPG/PNG/WebP), add audio (MP3/WAV/OGG/M4A or record), optionally add script text, and render a talking avatar with lip sync guidance and responsible-use rules.
